Join NICAR on the Internet

November 1995
Journalism & Newsroom

NICAR and IRE offer listserve subscriptions for journalists to discuss reporting techniques and professional development through email-based communities.

Don't forget to keep up with NICAR on the Internet. Subscribe to our listserve and join in as reporters talk about how to do the job better. E-mail to LISTSERV@MIZZOU1.MISSOURIEDU. In the message, on the first line, write: subscribe NICAR-L your name. To join IRE on the Internet, the instructions are the same except, on first line, write: subscribe ire-1 your name.
